edge_hypothesis: MACD histogram zero-cross (PF=1.712, ACCEPT #9) and Supertrend direction flip (PF=1.921, ACCEPT #3) are independently two of the top 5 performing signals. When both agree simultaneously — MACD histogram turns positive AND Supertrend confirms bullish — the entry timing should be superior because two independent mathematical frameworks (momentum oscillator vs volatility-trend) validate the same regime shift. This tests a critical research question: does synergy between proven signals compound edge, or just reduce frequency without benefit? The answer informs all future multi-signal designs.

Exit on max bars in trade threshold.
risk_rules: Risk note: ATR-based stop and TP for deterministic execution.
Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
8:1 R:R proven sweet spot across all ACCEPTs.

advisory_context.rationale: Synergy test — both MACD (PF=1.712) and Supertrend (PF=1.921) are independently top-5 ACCEPTs. Testing if dual-confirmation compounds or dilutes edge answers a critical research question for all future multi-signal designs.
